raw_input:
[5.0/5] Bakuchiol what!?? Say HELLO to hydrated and supple skin… I guess I’m not on top of the latest skin treatments because I admit I never heard of Bakuchiol until I tried this cream. Bakuchiol is a natural plant-based extract that works similarly to topical retinol for anti-aging effects by reducing the appearance of wrinkles and improving the firmness in skin. It is a gentler alternative to retinol, which is perfect for someone like me because I have sensitive skin.

This Korean beauty product arrived nicely packaged. From the outside of the jar, I thought this cream was a pale yellow, but it’s actually white. I used a small dollop and it was enough to cover my entire face and neck area too. The texture is light and creamy. There is no scent and it goes on clear after gently rubbing it in. I have combination to oily, sensitive skin and this did not feel greasy or make my face breakout, which is a huge plus!

I’ve been using this Bakuchiol cream in combination with a hyaluronic acid serum for only one week and the results are just AMAZING! My skin looks brighter and hydrated, and feels so nice and supple! Although I haven’t seen my wrinkles improve yet, I will happily continue using this product because the results so far have been very positive and promising! You dear Bakuchiol cream have earned a coveted spot on my limited bathroom counter space! [5.0/5] I have a skin condition, I know this won't solve but feels good. I have this skin condition that is like having dandruff on any skin surface above the neck, so when I got this I immediately put it on, it was cold, and felt good going on stung just a little because of my skin condition, but I am hopeful it will at least help a little it has for sure took away a bit of the pain when rubbing the skin slightly after applying it feels like most lotions do shortly after applying lol. So unless I get a weird rash or something I feel I will most likely use this daily after my shower/face washing. Scared me a little when half the box was Chinese other half English, yet the Chinese have known their medicinal herbs etc for hundreds or more years, so no reason to doubt. [5.0/5] Moisturizing It is very moisturizing. I like that there's no fragrance. Great for winter. [5.0/5] Nice alternative to retinol👍⭐️ Lightweight and has no fragrance. I have sensitive skin and had no irritation when using this product. It can be used in the AM and PM because there’s no sensitivity to the sun.

I cleaned my face, used toner, and then applied the cream. I only used a fingertip size to cover my face and neck.

Retinol products tend to irritate my skin, and having this as an alternative has done wonders for my skin. It keeps my skin moisturized.

EXPIRATION DATE: 10/25/2024
I always check for expiration dates before using, ESPECIALLY with any facial/body products. This expiration date tells me the product hasn’t been sitting somewhere but has been manufactured recently for distribution.

DISCLAIMER:
📝Yes, I am a VINE 🗣VOICE member. EVERY product that I review, I selected. The product or item is ALWAYS something that is needed and now is being used in my Home🏡 , Yard 🌱🍃, by my FAMILY 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦& Pets🦮🐾🐈‍⬛, or JUST BY ME 💁🏻‍♀️. [5.0/5] Superb Bakuchiol cream This is a lovely Bakuchiol cream. Bakuchiol is a fantastic natural alternative to retinol. It’s safe for sensitive skin and pregnant women! It’s not photosensitive (unlike retinol) so it can be used both am and pm. The packaging of this product feels simple yet luxurious. The glass jar packaging reminds me a lot of herbivore products.

This cream is lovely to use. It is a thicker heavier cream so, it does take a little longer to absorb. It’s non greasy and although it is a thick cream it does feel light weight once applied. As the cream absorbs it does give a nice radiant dewy glow to my skin tone. I can easily see how this cream would help with anti aging and fine lines with repeated daily use. I’ve been using this cream for about almost a week now and I love seeing my skin so well nourished and hydrated.

The ingredients in the cream are delightful. There is one ingredient that I always acknowledge. This cream does use a silicone ingredient polysilicone-34. I honestly don’t know much about this silicone ingredient and it might be the first product I have used that includes this particular silicone. This cream is gentle and effective even for sensitive skin but I do always acknowledge silicones in the ingredient list. In the week I have used this cream I have not noticed any close comedones, millia or any other adverse side effects from adding this cream to my skin care routines.

I love how deeply nourishing, refreshed and hydrating this cream is for my skin. Even though it takes a while to absorb when I use this cream in the mornings its still easy to apply my make up once this cream does absorb. I don’t wear foundation most days but occasionally I do wear a finishing powder to even out my skin tone if need or to help blend out my highlighter or blush. This cream doesn't sit heavy on my skin or interfere with my make up application or longevity.

I am very happy with this cream and would absolutely recommend it to those who have sensitive skin (as long as you tolerate silicone okay), or to those who prefer a retinol alternative that can still yield good results. [5.0/5] Great product I love this product. It comes in a glass jar and there isn't any smell/scent to it (although I personally wouldn't mind if they added a bit fragrance). I first tried it on my hands and they felt so smooth and silky afterwards. I later used it on my feet and no skin irritation either. My face is pretty sensitive so I tried this cream on my face last and I was fine too. [5.0/5] Perfect for sensitive skin I have been using this cream every day for almost two weeks, and I have to say, that it’s been a while since a skin care product impressed me so much. I honestly love everything about this cream, including the environmentally conscious packaging.
My skin is mature, clear and combination ( on the sensitive side), and prone to dryness during colder months. I can’t tolerate prescription strength retinols, so this is a wonderful alternative.
When I put this cream on - the consistency is of a thicker lotion and fragrance free- I get that luxurious feeling of well being and comfort. My skin feels well moisturized, soft, but not greasy.
I have been using the product twice a day with zero side effects. No dryness or burning. During the day, I wear a serum foundation, and this cream makes my face feel very comfortable and fresh, my foundation not sliding off or pilling.
I truly look forward to using this cream on a daily basis. [5.0/5] Very lightweight but feels good I keep coming back to this cream even though I have a few in my bathroom cabinet. I think I like it because it is a nongreasy formula, very lightweight, but it still makes you feel moisturized and refreshed. It adds a healthy glow to your skin. The ingredients seem very high quality and there are only 9 of them! The smell is very faint and lovely. Overall, a pleasure to use. [5.0/5] Beautiful, Gentle Cream - So Simple & So Nice - Great For Dry Skin & Sensitive Skin (Ingredients list is at the bottom of this review.)

I am really loving the TINAZANA Vegan Bakuchiol Comforting Cream (2.7oz / 80ml). Only 9 ingredients. It is so good. Truly comforting and non-irritating. Even when my skin is already in an irritated state.

This is a beautifully thick, rich, white moisturizing cream. Yet, somehow it feels decently lightweight and comfortable on the face and neck. Not lightweight like a gel cream, by any means. But comfortable. This cream glides onto the face and neck smoothly, and it soaks into the skin quickly; But it doesn't disappear. It leaves a lasting, soothing, comforting layer of moisture and hydration on the surface of the skin. It helps to lock-in the moisture and hydration from the previous steps in my skincare routine, and leave my skin feeling so lovely and comfortable.

The scent is extremely slight. It is herbal, but it's almost undetectable, unless you're really seeking after the scent.

The packaging is a beautiful yellow glass jar with a beige twist-off lid. It feels very nice in the hand, and the cream feels luxurious on the face. Much more expensive than it is. The 80ml size is excellent for the price.

The addition of gentle, anti-aging Bakuchiol is also a big win with zero irritation. Plus, Shea Butter for maximum moisture. I layer gentle, hydrating, soothing, calming toners and serums underneath this cream, and I get excellent glowy, dewy results.

I use this cream day and night, as I have dry, sensitive skin. I imagine many skin types might like this for day or night, especially during colder months.

If you have sensitive skin, and you cannot use most skincare products (like me), this is likely going to be for you.

Overall, I'm highly impressed. Why did it take me so long to find this? This cream is so beautifully simple. It's truly an amazing find for someone like me, who struggles with sensitive skin. I will definitely repurchase, and I'm looking forward to trying more simple, gentle products from Tinazana.

I highly recommend this cream to anyone and everyone.

INGREDIENTS:

Water, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Butylene Glycol, 1,2-Hexanediol, Polysilicone-34, Isononyl Isononanoate, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Ethyhexylglycerin, Bakuchiol. [4.0/5] light moisturizer this is a very light cream and i have not had any issues with it on my skin. i do not think it would be good for anybody that needs a more moisturizing cream, but i think it would be good for the summer or for people who just need some moisturizing. in the winter, i get very dry, so this is not quite as good for me at this time, but it absorbs well and is not greasy. [5.0/5] Great for sensitive skin This cream dosen't have any scent, is pretty light and absorbed quickly into skin living a nice glow ( not oily looking). [5.0/5] Best moisturize cream ever! My skin feels soft and looks great after applying just a small amount of cream. It’s is silky and best of all, it’s vegan! As a vegan, I have trouble finding products. To have a vegan cream of this quality is heaven! My sensitive skin tolerates it’s well and the end result is added confidence. This product is a definite “worth it”! [5.0/5] Super creamy and light. Natural ingredients. This cream is very light and soothing. The active ingredient works in the same way as tretinoin but is not as harsh. This cream has no scent. I am using this on my forearms and hands to help fade sun spots. It is a very good moisturizer and it feels light and soothing. [5.0/5] Nice! The first thing I noticed when I opened this up was the cream is very light. It has no smell to speak of and the appearance & feel of cold cream. That’s where the similarity ends. When I applied this to my face at first it felt very thin and almost runny but as I rubbed it in it began to feel thick and almost sticky. It left my face looking shiny and greasy, and I was prepared to write a bad review. However in a few minutes time the cream was completely absorbed and left my face feeling moisturized and soooo soft! It has caused no irritation or redness to my skin at all. I’ve only been using it about a week so I can’t see any long term improvements yet but so far I’m really happy with this comforting cream. [5.0/5] Nice night cream, my face super soft and plump Product: TINAZANA Vegan Bakuchiol Comforting Cream
The lotion is not fragranced at all. The lotion feels/looks like thin shea butter. On the face, it feels a lot like night cream with its thick-ish residual lotion feeling. However, it is not an oily feeling, and the face feels plumped after application and the next day as well. The container is made out of glass/hard acrylic and feels expensive. The external box packaging is made out of sugar cane :D Always nice to see a company committed to using recyclable packaging materials.
Overall I really enjoyed the product due to how soft my face feels even the next day.
My skin type: normal to dry, no known sensitivity nor allergy, not bothered by fragrance, not acne prone [4.0/5] Vegan Bakuchiol Comforting Face Cream Soothe Dry Skin No Scent I like this Vegan face replenishing and soothing cream but I took off a star because the cream is not very consistent. It is more watery than creamy. It looks good but when you take some out its very wet. I have been using it over 2 weeks and it is soothing, has no smell and I do think its helped my skin. The skin around my eyes looks better and feels better. [5.0/5] Unscented Cream, Long Lasting Effect This is a premium quality Korean skin care product. It gives my face a glow. Right after applying I can feel the cooling sensation when the molecules are going through my skin. I also like how Korean skin care products give very nice presentation with the glass jar. [5.0/5] Wonderful product This review is for TINAZANA Vegan Bakuchiol Comforting Cream Sensitive Dry Skin.

It's true, this product is wonderful for people with dry sensitive skin. I noticed a difference in the texture of my skin in just a few weeks, and it's non-irritating and completely moisturizing so it's been great for my dry sensitive skin. Also, it has a nice calming effect; great for those days when my skin is just a little overworked.

But comfortable. This cream glides onto the face and neck smoothly, and it soaks into the skin quickly; But it doesn't disappear. It leaves a lasting, soothing, comforting layer of moisture and hydration on the surface of the skin. It helps to lock-in the moisture and hydration from the previous steps in my skincare routine, and leave my skin feeling so lovely and comfortable.

The scent is extremely slight. It is herbal, but it's almost undetectable, unless you're really seeking after the scent.

The packaging is a beautiful yellow glass jar with a beige twist-off lid. It feels very nice in the hand, and the cream feels luxurious on the face. Much more expensive than it is. The 80ml size is excellent for the price.

The addition of gentle, anti-aging Bakuchiol is also a big win with zero irritation. Plus, Shea Butter for maximum moisture. I layer gentle, hydrating, soothing, calming toners and serums underneath this cream, and I get excellent glowy, dewy results.

I use this cream day and night, as I have dry, sensitive skin. I imagine many skin types might like this for day or night, especially during colder months.

If you have sensitive skin, and you cannot use most skincare products (like me), this is likely going to be for you.

Overall, I'm highly impressed. Why did it take me so long to find this? This cream is so beautifully simple. It's truly an amazing find for someone like me, who struggles with sensitive skin. I will definitely repurchase, and I'm looking forward to trying more simple, gentle products from Tinazana.

I highly recommend this cream to anyone and everyone.

response:
Here is a summary of the product reviews:

The TINAZANA Vegan Bakuchiol Comforting Cream received overwhelmingly positive feedback, with most reviewers giving it 5 out of 5 stars. The standout feature praised across nearly all reviews is that the cream is fragrance-free and gentle enough for sensitive skin, with many reviewers noting they switched to it as an alternative to retinol due to skin irritation from retinol products.

Reviewers consistently described the cream as lightweight yet moisturizing, non-greasy, and quick to absorb while leaving skin feeling soft, hydrated, and glowing. Several noted that a small amount goes a long way and that it works well on the face, neck, hands, and feet. The cream was also praised for not interfering with makeup application.

The packaging received positive mentions, with reviewers appreciating the glass jar and eco-friendly materials. A few reviewers highlighted the short, simple ingredient list of only 9 ingredients, including Bakuchiol and Shea Butter.

Many reviewers reported noticeable improvements in skin hydration, softness, and brightness within just one to two weeks of use. The cream was noted as being safe for use both morning and night since Bakuchiol, unlike retinol, does not cause sun sensitivity.

The only minor criticisms were that the cream may not be moisturizing enough for very dry skin in winter, and one reviewer found the consistency to be more watery than expected.
